Name: curvature_aware_precision_routing
Title: Curvature-Aware Precision Routing for Mixed-Precision Quantization in Deep Learning
Short Hypothesis: We hypothesize that a curvature-aware precision routing framework can efficiently optimize mixed-precision quantization in deep learning models, leading to improved accuracy and reduced computational cost.
Related Work: Recent works such as EMQ, SNIP, and AMP-ViT have explored mixed-precision quantization, but they rely on heuristic-based methods or manual configurations. Our approach differs by introducing a curvature-aware precision routing framework that leverages geometric subspace diagnostics and deterministic optimization proxies to optimize mixed-precision quantization.
Abstract: This proposal introduces a novel curvature-aware precision routing framework for mixed-precision quantization in deep learning. Our approach combines geometric subspace diagnostics with deterministic optimization proxies to efficiently optimize mixed-precision quantization. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework through extensive experiments on various deep learning models, showing improved accuracy and reduced computational cost compared to state-of-the-art methods.
Experiments: Experiment 1: Evaluate the effectiveness of our curvature-aware precision routing framework on ImageNet using ResNet and MobileNet models.
Experiment 2: Compare our approach with state-of-the-art mixed-precision quantization methods, such as EMQ and SNIP, on large language models.
Experiment 3: Investigate the impact of curvature-aware precision routing on the robustness and generalization of deep learning models.
Risk Factors and Limitations: The complexity of the curvature-aware precision routing framework may lead to increased computational overhead.
The effectiveness of our approach may depend on the specific deep learning model and dataset used.
